apr_breakdown.annualization_note: This is a 21-day loan. You receive ₹2,575 and repay ₹3,063, so the total borrowing cost is ₹488. Annualizing a 21-day loan with that cost produces an extremely high APR.

rbi_rules.description: Key Fact Statement (KFS) provided before signing
rbi_rules.detail: No KFS found. RBI mandates KFS for all digital loans before borrower acceptance.

rbi_rules.description: Annual Percentage Rate (APR) explicitly stated
rbi_rules.detail: APR not disclosed. RBI requires APR including all fees in the KFS.

rbi_rules.description: All fees itemized (processing fee, insurance, GST)
rbi_rules.detail: Processing fee details found in document.

rbi_rules.description: Grievance redressal mechanism and contact stated
rbi_rules.detail: No grievance officer contact found. Borrower has no formal recourse path stated.
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: Loan tenure ≥ 30 days (RBI minimum)
rbi_rules.detail: Tenure: 21 days — below RBI minimum of 30 days. Short-tenure loans create extreme APR and debt traps.

rbi_rules.description: Clear repayment schedule or total repayment amount stated
rbi_rules.detail: Total repayment: ₹3,063
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: Prepayment/foreclosure terms disclosed
rbi_rules.detail: Prepayment terms: Prepayment not permitted during loan tenure. Full repayment amount must be paid on due date.
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: Late payment / penal charges disclosed
rbi_rules.detail: Penal charges: 50 per day flat. After 30 days, compound interest at 48% per annum shall apply on outstanding amount.
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: Penal charges: simple interest only (not compound)
rbi_rules.detail: VIOLATION: Compound penal interest found — only simple interest is permitted on overdue.

rbi_rules.description: Cooling-off period ≥ 3 days mentioned
rbi_rules.detail: Cooling-off period not mentioned. RBI mandates minimum 3 days to exit without penalty.

rbi_rules.description: NBFC/Bank name explicitly stated
rbi_rules.detail: Lender: QuickCash Financial Services Private Limited
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: RBI registration / COR number present
rbi_rules.detail: RBI registration number not found. Verify lender legitimacy at rbi.org.in.

rbi_rules.description: Grievance officer name and contact stated
rbi_rules.detail: Grievance officer contact missing.
rbi_rules.rbi_reference: RBI Fair Practice Code for NBFCs (Master Circular)

rbi_rules.description: Processing fee stated as amount or percentage
rbi_rules.detail: Processing fee: ₹360 (0%)

rbi_rules.description: Insurance premium disclosed separately
rbi_rules.detail: Insurance premium not separately disclosed (may be hidden inside other charges).

rbi_rules.description: GST applicability on fees stated
rbi_rules.detail: GST on fees: ₹65

rbi_rules.description: Disbursed amount = sanctioned amount minus only disclosed fees
rbi_rules.detail: Sanctioned: ₹3,000 | Disbursed: ₹2,575 | Disbursement matches disclosed fees. ✓

rbi_rules.description: No undisclosed fees deducted from disbursement
rbi_rules.detail: Deductions (₹425) accounted for by disclosed fees. ✓

rbi_rules.description: Repayments go directly to NBFC/bank account
rbi_rules.detail: Repayment not via direct bank transfer — possible illegal third-party routing.

rbi_rules.description: Late fee capped at simple interest on overdue amount only
rbi_rules.detail: Potential violation: penal charges may not comply with RBI cap. Review: 50 per day flat. After 30 days, compound interest at 48% per annum shall apply on outstanding amount.

rbi_rules.description: App does not access contacts/gallery (requires app permissions check)
rbi_rules.detail: Cannot verify from document alone — check app permissions on your phone. RBI prohibits apps from accessing contacts, photos, or location beyond KYC needs.

violations_summary: Rule 1: Key Fact Statement (KFS) provided before signing
Rule 2: Annual Percentage Rate (APR) explicitly stated
Rule 4: Grievance redressal mechanism and contact stated
Rule 9: Penal charges: simple interest only (not compound)
Rule 12: RBI registration / COR number present
Rule 13: Grievance officer name and contact stated
Rule 19: Repayments go directly to NBFC/bank account
Rule 20: Late fee capped at simple interest on overdue amount only

verdict.english: This loan has an effective APR of 1941.7%, which is 53.9 times higher than the stated 36%. Due to 10 RBI violations, including the failure to provide a Key Fact Statement, this loan likely violates RBI regulations. File a complaint at cms.rbi.org.in.
verdict.hindi: इस लोन की वास्तविक ब्याज दर 1941.7% है, जो बताई गई दर से 53.9 गुना ज्यादा है। आरबीआई के 10 नियमों का उल्लंघन होने के कारण, यह लोन आरबीआई के नियमों के खिलाफ है। अपनी शिकायत cms.rbi.org.in पर दर्ज करें।
verdict.kannada: ಈ ಸಾಲದ ಬಡ್ಡಿ ದರವು ಹೇಳಿದ್ದಕ್ಕಿಂತ 53.9 ಪಟ್ಟು ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗಿದ್ದು, 1941.7% ರಷ್ಟಿದೆ. ಆರ್‌ಬಿಐನ 10 ನಿಯಮಗಳನ್ನು ಉಲ್ಲಂಘಿಸಿರುವುದರಿಂದ, ಈ ಸಾಲವು ಆರ್‌ಬಿಐ ನಿಯಮಗಳಿಗೆ ವಿರುದ್ಧವಾಗಿದೆ. ದಯವಿಟ್ಟು cms.rbi.org.in ನಲ್ಲಿ ದೂರು ಸಲ್ಲಿಸಿ.
